---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# *Himanshu Goel*

::: {.tagline}
Computational Biology, Chemistry & Toxicology · Drug Design · AI/ML · Cheminformatics · Bioinformatics  
📍 Ellicott City, MD · [hgchemical@gmail.com](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)
:::

::: {.badge-row}
[🧬 Computational Drug Discovery]{.hero-badge}
[🤖 Agentic AI / LLM]{.hero-badge}
[🧪 Toxicogenomics]{.hero-badge}
[📊 Cheminformatics]{.hero-badge}
[🔬 Bioinformatics]{.hero-badge}
[⚙️ Molecular Dynamics]{.hero-badge}
:::
:::


---

## About me

Experienced Computational Scientist with over 7 years of interdisciplinary experience in computational chemistry, biology, and toxicology. Possesses a strong background in computer-aided drug design, predictive toxicology, cheminformatics, bioinformatics, toxicogenomics, molecular dynamics, Monte Carlo, DFT, RNA-Seq, high-throughput screening, electrophysiological, in vivo and in vitro assays, multi-OMICS, NAM, and real-world datasets. Skilled in integrating diverse experimental data to inform translational research and drug design workflows using advanced AI/ML techniques and statistical analysis. Proficient in deep learning, transfer learning, generative AI, LLM, RAG, and agentic AI applied to real-world applications. Demonstrates a strong ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, including biologists, chemists, toxicologists, and software engineers, to validate in silico findings and develop robust computational pipelines that enhance data interpretation and translational impact.

Most recently I was a Computational Research Scientist II at [BHSAI / Henry M. Jackson Foundation](https://bhsai.org/) (Frederick, MD), working on DoD, DTRA, NIH, and AFRL funded projects. Before that I was a postdoctoral researcher in [Dr. Alex MacKerell's CADD Center](https://mackerell.umaryland.edu/) at the University of Maryland, Baltimore, where I developed and applied the [SILCS technology](https://silcsbio.com/) for protein-ligand binding and drug design.

**I'm currently open to new opportunities** in computational toxicology, drug screening & discovery, AI/ML for life sciences, or research scientist roles. [Get in touch →](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com)

→ [See my full education & research journey](education.qmd)  
→ [15 publications on Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)

---

## Expertise

::: {.expertise-grid}
[Computer-Aided Drug Design]{.expertise-pill}
[Machine Learning / Deep Learning]{.expertise-pill}
[Graph Neural Networks]{.expertise-pill}
[LLM / Transformer models]{.expertise-pill}
[Agentic AI / LangGraph / RAG]{.expertise-pill}
[Generative AI for molecules]{.expertise-pill}
[RNA-Seq / Toxicogenomics]{.expertise-pill}
[Molecular Dynamics]{.expertise-pill}
[Monte Carlo Simulations]{.expertise-pill}
[DFT / Quantum Chemistry]{.expertise-pill}
[ADMET Profiling]{.expertise-pill}
[Cheminformatics / RDKit]{.expertise-pill}
[Multi-Electrode Array (MEA)]{.expertise-pill}
[In Vivo & In Vitro Assays]{.expertise-pill}
[Multi-OMICS]{.expertise-pill}
[New Approach Methodologies (NAM)]{.expertise-pill}
[Python · R · Fortran · C++]{.expertise-pill}
:::

---
